import React, { useState, useRef } from "react"; import defaultImg from "../../image/default.jpg"; import background1 from "../../image/background1.jpg"; import { Formik, Field, Form } from "formik"; import { validationSchema } from "./application.schema"; function Application() { const saveProfile = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("userProfile")) || {}; const saveImg = localStorage.getItem("profileImg"); const [user, setUser] = useState({ profileImg: saveImg || defaultImg, }); const fileInputRef = useRef(); const handleProfileChange = (event) => { const file = event.target.files[0]; if (file) { const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = (e) => { const imgData = e.target.result; localStorage.setItem("profileImg", imgData); setUser({ profileImg: imgData }); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } }; return (
